canonical_listings_money_nonnegative.name: canonical_listings_money_nonnegative
canonical_listings_money_nonnegative.value:
("canonical_listings"."monthly_rent_cents" IS NULL OR "canonical_listings"."monthly_rent_cents" >= 0)
        AND ("canonical_listings"."recurring_fees_cents" IS NULL OR "canonical_listings"."recurring_fees_cents" >= 0)

canonical_listings_projection_redirect_c.name: canonical_listings_projection_redirect_consistency
canonical_listings_projection_redirect_c.value:
("canonical_listings"."projection_state" = 'active' AND "canonical_listings"."superseded_by_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("canonical_listings"."projection_state" = 'superseded' AND "canonical_listings"."superseded_by_id" IS NOT NULL)

field_provenance_unknown_consistency.name: field_provenance_unknown_consistency

listing_extractions_mode_metadata_consis.name: listing_extractions_mode_metadata_consistency
listing_extractions_mode_metadata_consis.value:
(
        "listing_extractions"."mode" = 'deterministic_only'
        AND "listing_extractions"."provider_id" IS NULL
        AND "listing_extractions"."model" IS NULL
        AND "listing_extractions"."response_id" IS NULL
        AND "listing_extractions"."provider_result" IS NULL
        AND "listing_extractions"."input_tokens" = 0
        AND "listing_extractions"."output_tokens" = 0
        AND "listing_extractions"."total_tokens" = 0
        AND "listing_extractions"."latency_milliseconds" = 0
        AND "listing_extractions"."repair_count" = 0
      ) OR (
        "listing_extractions"."mode" = 'llm_augmented'
        AND "listing_extractions"."provider_id" IS NOT NULL
        AND "listing_extractions"."model" IS NOT NULL
        AND "listing_extractions"."provider_result" IS NOT NULL
      )

listing_photos_reference_required.name: listing_photos_reference_required
listing_photos_reference_required.value: "listing_photos"."source_url" IS NOT NULL OR "listing_photos"."fixture_asset_label" IS NOT NULL

listing_photos_decoded_metadata_consiste.name: listing_photos_decoded_metadata_consistency
listing_photos_decoded_metadata_consiste.value: (("listing_photos"."byte_size" IS NULL) + ("listing_photos"."width" IS NULL) + ("listing_photos"."height" IS NULL) + ("listing_photos"."mime_type" IS NULL)) IN (0, 4)

listing_scores_v2_ranges.name: listing_scores_v2_ranges
listing_scores_v2_ranges.value:
("listing_scores"."base_score_basis_points" IS NULL OR "listing_scores"."base_score_basis_points" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000)
        AND ("listing_scores"."stale_penalty_basis_points" IS NULL OR "listing_scores"."stale_penalty_basis_points" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000)
        AND ("listing_scores"."low_confidence_penalty_basis_points" IS NULL OR "listing_scores"."low_confidence_penalty_basis_points" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000)
        AND ("listing_scores"."risk_penalty_basis_points" IS NULL OR "listing_scores"."risk_penalty_basis_points" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000)
        AND ("listing_scores"."final_score_basis_points" IS NULL OR "listing_scores"."final_score_basis_points" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000)

listing_source_records_money_nonnegative.name: listing_source_records_money_nonnegative
listing_source_records_money_nonnegative.value:
("listing_source_records"."monthly_rent_cents" IS NULL OR "listing_source_records"."monthly_rent_cents" >= 0)
        AND ("listing_source_records"."recurring_fees_cents" IS NULL OR "listing_source_records"."recurring_fees_cents" >= 0)

normalization_jobs_attempt_state_consist.name: normalization_jobs_attempt_state_consistency

normalization_jobs_lease_consistency.name: normalization_jobs_lease_consistency
normalization_jobs_lease_consistency.value:
(
        "normalization_jobs"."state" = 'leased'
        AND "normalization_jobs"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL
        AND "normalization_jobs"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL
      ) OR (
        "normalization_jobs"."state" <> 'leased'
        AND "normalization_jobs"."lease_owner" IS NULL
        AND "normalization_jobs"."lease_expires_at" IS NULL
      )

normalization_jobs_completion_consistenc.name: normalization_jobs_completion_consistency
normalization_jobs_completion_consistenc.value:
(
        "normalization_jobs"."state" = 'completed'
        AND "normalization_jobs"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL
      ) OR (
        "normalization_jobs"."state" <> 'completed'
        AND "normalization_jobs"."completed_at" IS NULL
      )

normalization_jobs_error_state_consisten.name: normalization_jobs_error_state_consistency
normalization_jobs_error_state_consisten.value:
(
        "normalization_jobs"."state" IN ('queued', 'completed')
        AND "normalization_jobs"."last_error_code" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "normalization_jobs"."state" IN ('retryable', 'dead_letter')
        AND "normalization_jobs"."last_error_code" IS NOT NULL
      ) OR "normalization_jobs"."state" = 'leased'

raw_listings_evidence_required.name: raw_listings_evidence_required
raw_listings_evidence_required.value: "raw_listings"."raw_text" IS NOT NULL OR "raw_listings"."raw_json" IS NOT NULL

raw_listings_capture_mode_consistency.name: raw_listings_capture_mode_consistency
raw_listings_capture_mode_consistency.value:
("raw_listings"."capture_method" = 'fixture' AND "raw_listings"."acquisition_mode" = 'fixture')
        OR ("raw_listings"."capture_method" IN ('manual_text', 'manual_structured') AND "raw_listings"."acquisition_mode" = 'user_capture')
        OR ("raw_listings"."capture_method" = 'official_api' AND "raw_listings"."acquisition_mode" = 'official_api')
        OR ("raw_listings"."capture_method" = 'email_alert' AND "raw_listings"."acquisition_mode" = 'email_alert')
        OR ("raw_listings"."capture_method" = 'local_browser' AND "raw_listings"."acquisition_mode" = 'local_browser')

search_profiles_budget_nonnegative.name: search_profiles_budget_nonnegative
search_profiles_budget_nonnegative.value:
("search_profiles"."target_monthly_total_cents" IS NULL OR "search_profiles"."target_monthly_total_cents" >= 0)
        AND ("search_profiles"."absolute_monthly_maximum_cents" IS NULL OR "search_profiles"."absolute_monthly_maximum_cents" >= 0)
